attempts.reflection: You need to prioritize crafting a furnace before attempting to smelt iron ore. Specifically, after obtaining cobblestone, craft a furnace first. Then use the furnace to smelt the iron ore into iron ingots. Finally, craft the iron helmet using the iron ingots. Additionally, ensure you have a crafting table to manage your inventory more efficiently.

attempts.reflection: You need to prioritize crafting a wooden pickaxe before attempting to mine cobblestone or iron ore. Specifically, after crafting the initial crafting table, use it to craft oak planks, then craft a wooden pickaxe using sticks and oak planks. This will allow you to mine cobblestone and eventually iron ore. Additionally, ensure you craft more sticks and oak planks as needed to avoid running out of materials.
